note: Cash forecast accuracy: MAPE/bias/timing-vs-volume decomposition across T+1/7/30 horizons per AFP 2024 benchmarks.

vectors.name: excellent_t1_accuracy_2pct_mape
vectors.description: Single T+1 observation: actual=1000000, forecast=1020000 → MAPE=2%, EXCELLENT tier, no timing bias.

output_payload.afp_benchmark_tiers: EXCELLENT < 5% / GOOD 5-10% / ACCEPTABLE 10-20% / POOR >= 20% (AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024)
output_payload.table_source: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023; GTreasury TMS Benchmark 2024
output_payload.regulatory_basis: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024 MAPE benchmarks; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023 T+1/T+7/T+30 horizon tiers. MAPE = mean(|actual-forecast|/|actual|)*100; bias = mean((forecast-actual)/|actual|)*100; persistent directional bias (>75% same-sign) flagged as systematic timing issue.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: forecast amounts, actual amounts, and horizon metadata only. No account holder, cash-pool owner, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not financial or investment advice. Cash forecast accuracy scoring is for internal TMS benchmarking only.

vectors.name: poor_accuracy_systematic_over_forecast
vectors.description: 3 observations all over-forecast by 50%/40%/30% across T+7 and T+30 → MAPE=40%, POOR, timing_bias_detected=true (100% positive).

output_payload.afp_benchmark_tiers: EXCELLENT < 5% / GOOD 5-10% / ACCEPTABLE 10-20% / POOR >= 20% (AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024)
output_payload.table_source: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023; GTreasury TMS Benchmark 2024
output_payload.regulatory_basis: AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024 MAPE benchmarks; Gartner Treasury Analytics 2023 T+1/T+7/T+30 horizon tiers. MAPE = mean(|actual-forecast|/|actual|)*100; bias = mean((forecast-actual)/|actual|)*100; persistent directional bias (>75% same-sign) flagged as systematic timing issue.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: forecast amounts, actual amounts, and horizon metadata only. No account holder, cash-pool owner, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not financial or investment advice. Cash forecast accuracy scoring is for internal TMS benchmarking only.

vectors.name: good_mixed_horizons_no_bias
vectors.description: 2 observations: T+1 over by 6%, T+7 under by 5% → MAPE=5.5%, GOOD tier, no timing bias (insufficient obs for detection).

output_payload.afp_benchmark_tiers: EXCELLENT < 5% / GOOD 5-10% / ACCEPTABLE 10-20% / POOR >= 20% (AFP Cash Forecasting Survey 2024)
